web.title: One Twenty Brickell Residences Miami | Prices & Information
web.description: All luxury condos at One Twenty Brickell include fully furnished and finished residences, designer polywood floors, fully built-in closets in master bedrooms.

![](https://onetwenty.miami/assets/images/image01.png?v=4e6eba58)

First of its kind residences with Deeded Office Suites

[En español](https://es.onetwenty.miami/)

[![#home](https://onetwenty.miami/assets/images/image15.png?v=4e6eba58)](https://onetwenty.miami/#home)

## One Twenty Brickell is Inspired by the dynamic neighborhood it calls home... Featuring Residences designed with Brickell's vibrant atmosphere at its core.

240 Residences / 34 Stories.Studio to Three Bedroom Configurations. **ALL INCLUDING DEEDED OFFICE SPACE!**Developed by Property Markets Group & Designed by Sieger Suarez Architects.

**[Residences](https://onetwenty.miami/#residences)**

**[Floor Plans](https://onetwenty.miami/#floorplans)**

**[Amenities](https://onetwenty.miami/#amenities)**

**[Location](https://onetwenty.miami/#location)**

**[Prices & Payment Plan](https://onetwenty.miami/#prices)**

**[Contact Us](https://onetwenty.miami/#contact)**

Delivery 2028

![](https://onetwenty.miami/assets/images/image06.jpg?v=4e6eba58)

Text

![](https://onetwenty.miami/assets/images/image05.jpg?v=4e6eba58)

### Studio to Three Bedroom Configurations

## The Residences

All luxury condos at One Twenty Brickell include fully furnished and finished residences, designer polywood floors, fully built-in closets in master bedrooms, high-end washer and dryer, smart home technology for seamless customization, contemporary lighting package and AN OFFICE SPACE!

- [![All residences equipped with a contemporary lighting package](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://onetwenty.miami/assets/images/gallery04/91cec456_original.jpg?v=4e6eba58)

### Spectacular Common Areas

## Luxury Amenities

120 Brickell offers 60,000 square feet of amazing amenities, including a sky bar and lounge overlooking the Brickell skyline, double-height sky owner's lounge with catering kitchen, an event and meeting space, pool deck, yoga lawn, wellness spa, fitness center, pickleball court, cafe & juice bar, and more!

## Exclusive office suites!

A UNIQUE OPPORTUNITY... **One Deeded Office Space Included with your Residence!** Featuring:\- Complimentary Wi-Fi

\- Glass encased design

\- Lockable entry

\- Desk with chair

\- 2 guest chairs

\- Prewired for TV's

\- Wallpapered accent wall

\- Concierge assistant services

\- Dedicated office elevators

\- Lounge & coffee bar

The views from 120 Brickell's Residences are just breathtaking. They include the Miami's Downtown and Brickell areas, the Miami River and the Atlantic Ocean

### SOUTH OF BRICKELL

## THE LOCATION

Building Address:

[120 SW 9th St, Miami, FL 33130](https://maps.app.goo.gl/TZ7mVcrZHWR9yhyr9)

\- Brickell City Centre: 1 minute walk\- Downtown: 10 minutes’ wak\- Wynwood: 15 minutes’ drive\- Miami Beaches: 15 minutes’ drive\- Miami Airport: 15 minutes’ drive\- Key Biscayne: 10 minutes’ drive

## The area of Brickell

Brickell stands as Miami's premier urban enclave, characterized by its towering skyscrapers, bustling financial district, and luxurious residential offerings. Known as the "Manhattan of the South," it exudes a vibrant energy with a blend of business sophistication and cosmopolitan lifestyle. From its world-class dining and nightlife to its upscale shopping and cultural attractions, Brickell offers residents and visitors alike a dynamic urban experience against the backdrop of stunning waterfront views. With continuous development and a strong investment landscape, Brickell remains at the forefront of Miami's growth, making it a highly desirable destination for those seeking a blend of modernity, convenience, and luxury in the heart of the city.

![](https://onetwenty.miami/assets/images/image11.jpg?v=4e6eba58)

![](https://onetwenty.miami/assets/images/image04.jpg?v=4e6eba58)

### LATest NEWS

## One Twenty Brickell cranes are here!

The best residential & office project was a great success, it is completely sold out and already has its cranes installed to begin vertical construction…Updated on: 02/09/2026

## Developers

PMG is one of the few large-scale vertically integrated developers that can rely on its own team to lead the entire development from acquisition to structuring and operations. The Property Markets Group staff has offices in Miami and Manhattan, specializing in exceptional new construction residential and commercial projects. For nearly 30 years, PMG has led the acquisition, financing, development, construction and marketing of 85 residential buildings and more than 150 real estate projects. This co-development company of Property Markets Group and E11EVEN Partners ensures the creation of a high value-added facility, with an elegant sense of space and a refined quality of life. PMG’s residential portfolio includes [E11EVEN Beyond](https://miamiresidential.com/es/e11evenbeyond/), [Echo Brickell](https://miamiresidential.com/es/echobrickell/), [Echo Aventura](https://miamiresidential.com/es/echoaventura/), [Waldorf Astoria](https://miamiresidential.com/es/waldorfastoriamiami/), [The Elser](https://miamiresidential.com/es/theelser) and [Muse Residences Sunny Isles](https://miamiresidential.com/es/musesunnyisles/).

![](https://onetwenty.miami/assets/images/image10.jpg?v=4e6eba58)

[Prices](https://onetwenty.miami/#prices) \| [Location](https://onetwenty.miami/#location) \| [Contact Us](https://onetwenty.miami/#contact)

![](https://onetwenty.miami/assets/images/image18.jpg?v=4e6eba58)

## The Architect

Sieger Suarez Architects, based in Miami, is a renowned firm known for designing luxurious residential and commercial projects, including high-rise towers like the [Porsche Design Tower](https://miamiresidential.com/porschetower) and [St. Regis Bal Harbour](https://miamiresidential.com/stregisbalharbour). Founded by Charles M. Sieger and Jose J. Suarez, the firm is acclaimed for its innovative, modern designs and use of advanced technology and sustainable practices. Their work has earned numerous awards, solidifying their status as industry leaders.

Your browser does not support the video tag.

# One Twenty Brickell Residences

### **Brickell / 2028**

34 Stories / 240 Residences of
Studios, 1, 2 & 3 Bedrooms

**120 SW 8th St, Miami, FL 33130, USA**

[+1.305.328.8560](tel:13053288560)

Average Price: $1,400 x SF ($15,069 x M2)

One Twenty Brickell Residences is the latest new development with short term rentals in the fabulous area of Brickell in Downtown Miami. This community will offer luxury residences and spectacular amenities and services, and breathtaking views which include the Miami's Downtown and Brickell areas, the Miami River and the Atlantic Ocean. Inspired by the dynamic neighborhood it calls home, One Twenty Brickell Residences are designed with Brickell's vibrant atmosphere at its core. All condos are including Office Space in the building!

This project is currently in under construction and prices start at . Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/120brickell/#contactform) for more information.

## Features

### Building Features

- Sky bar and lounge overlooking the Brickell skyline
- Double-height sky owner's lounge with catering kitchen
- Immersive event and meeting space
- Dog run
- Massage studios
- Sauna and steam rooms
- Pickleball court
- Yoga lawn
- Jacuzzi
- Gym
- Cafe juice bar
- Kids gym
- Pool

### Residence Features

- Fully furnished and finished studio, 1-, 2-, and 3-bedroom residences
- Designer polywood flooring
- Flooring selections curated by Cotofana Designs
- Fully built-out closets in the primary bedrooms including all shelving and drawers pre-installed for absolute convenience
- Built-in top-of-the-line washer and dryer
- Each residence offers an unprecedented level of efficiency through a smart home technology experience for seamless personalization with the touch of a button
- All residences equipped with a contemporary lighting package
- Pre-wired for high-speed communications, multiple telephone lines, and cable
- Fully-integrated Italia kitchens with custom countertops, backsplashes and a contemporary under-mount sink
- Mlele and additional appliance package includes induction cooktop, microwave, dishwasher, built-in convection oven and refrigerator
- Imported custom Italian kitchen and bathroom cabinetry by Italkraft
- WaterWorks bathroom fixtures
- Custom bathroom countertops and finished floors and walls in wet areas
- Glass-enclosed showers

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/05-One-Twenty-Brickell-Office.jpg)

## Developers

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/Developer-PMG.jpg)

PMG is one of the few large-scale vertically integrated developers that can rely on its own team to lead the entire development from acquisition to structuring and operations. This co-development company of Property Markets Group and E11EVEN Partners ensures the creation of a high value-added facility, with an elegant sense of space and a refined quality of life. PMG’s residential portfolio includes [E11EVEN Beyond](https://miamiresidential.com/e11evenbeyond/), [Echo Brickell](https://miamiresidential.com/echobrickell/), [Echo Aventura](https://miamiresidential.com/echoaventura/), [Waldorf Astoria](https://miamiresidential.com/waldorfastoriamiami/), [The Elser](https://miamiresidential.com/theelser) and [Muse Residences Sunny Isles](https://miamiresidential.com/musesunnyisles).
